title: AquaSharp 16x
description: A PVP pack usefull for all combat minigames and more. Needs Optifine
body:
🌊 AquaSharp 🌊

Smooth block textures with FPS boost 
Vibrant aqua-turquoise theme for striking visuals 
Short swords for precise combat ⚔️
Clean block textures for a polished look 
Custom particles to enhance the experience 
New custom sky for a fresh atmosphere 
Optimized for high FPS and smooth gameplay 
Improved armor models for a sleek appearance 
Enhanced visibility with Hardcore Hearts for half hearts 
Edited sounds for a better audio experience with headphones 🎧
AquaSharp is perfect for UHC, BedWars, SkyWars, and more, providing a dynamic edge in every battle. 🔥

contact me: @manuallgamer
